market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Amazon CEO reportedly raised Anthropic model concerns before government crackdown
articles.description: Amazon CEO Andy Jassy may have been the source of security concerns that led Anthropic to cut off worldwide access to two models on Friday.

articles.title: Crypto’s next billion-dollar hacker may move at superhuman speed
articles.description: Anthropic’s new Claude Fable 5 puts powerful cyber tools behind safety filters. DeFi, already hit by more than $840 million in hacks this year, is one of the industries with the most to lose if the filters fail.

articles.title: Here's what SpaceX's IPO means for its $1.3 billion bitcoin reserve
articles.description: The largest company on public markets now holds bitcoin as a treasury reserve, not as a business model. Its first earnings cycles will test which version of corporate crypto survives a bear market.

articles.title: Stablecoins Were Meant to Disrupt Finance. Instead, They Became Idle Cash.
articles.description: O’Connor argues that crypto’s clearest success story has scaled as money but not as capital.

articles.title: OpenAI faces investigation from state attorneys general
articles.description: It's not clear which states are involved, but they're asking about everything from OpenAI's ad policies to its handling of health data.

articles.title: Bitcoin rises above $64,000 after Pakistan prime minister says Iran peace deal is near
articles.description: Bitcoin traded above $64,000 on Saturday, supported by its strongest ETF inflows in a month and growing optimism around geopolitical developments.

articles.title: 同胞雙星化學成分大不同，HD 81809 上演恆星生吞行星的「犯罪現場」
articles.description: 天文學家研究一個名為 HD 81809 的特殊雙星系統時，發現兩顆理應同時誕生的恆星，竟擁有截然不同的化學組成 […]

articles.title: 外星訪客 3I/ATLAS 又有新發現，韋伯直接偵測到含甲烷與大量二氧化碳
articles.description: NASA 詹姆斯·韋伯太空望遠鏡再傳突破，首次在彗星 3I/ATLAS 直接偵測到甲烷，並確認含異常大量二氧化 […]

articles.title: Wall Street is moving past crypto pilots and deeper into Ethereum, says Etherealize founder
articles.description: In an interview with CoinDesk, Etherealize cofounder Vivek Raman said Ethereum is currently in a transitional phase where the infrastructure has largely been built, but the scale of adoption has yet to be fully reflected in ETH itself.

articles.title: This thin under-pillow speaker helped me fall asleep without earbuds
articles.description: I’ve struggled with insomnia since I was very young. Like many chronic overthinkers, I tend to fall asleep best when my mind is occupied by something else, such as podcasts, YouTube compilations, or my personal favorite: rain sounds. But earbuds can be uncomfortable, and playing audio out loud isn’t

articles.title: Tokenization mirrors the $20 trillion ETF boom as blockchain and AI converge, Ondo exec says
articles.description: Tokenization is laying the groundwork for autonomous investing and real-time portfolio management, Ondo's new head of portfolio products John Hoffman said.

articles.title: Anthropic's Mythos AI finds no more 'serious' bugs in Zcash: Wilcox
articles.description: Zcash founder Zooko Wilcox said Anthropic's Mythos AI model found no further "serious bugs" in the privacy protocol following the patching of a previously discovered forgery bug.

articles.title: Perpetual futures could become crypto's next ETF moment
articles.description: John Palmer, head of derivatives at Kraken, said he expects sophisticated traders to lead adoption of newly approved U.S. perpetual futures, with broader institutional participation likely to follow over time.

articles.title: Bitcoin sales are necessary for Strategy's digital credit business, Saylor says
articles.description: Strategy's recent Bitcoin sale appeared to clash with Saylor's "never sell" mantra, but he says the move reflects how the company's digital credit business works.

articles.title: Saylor to Musk: Thanks to you, 25% of 'Mag8' firms now hold bitcoin
articles.description: "Thanks to you, 25% of the Mag8 now holds bitcoin on the balance sheet," Saylor wrote on X, congratulating Musk on SpaceX's historic IPO debut.

articles.title: Crypto should adopt the best of centralization, says LMAX CEO
articles.description: As digital assets mature the industry should borrow more from traditional market infrastructure, especially credit, clearing and collateral systems, David Mercer argues.

articles.title: Morpho's $175M raise shows where crypto VC money is flowing
articles.description: Morpho’s recent $175 million raise reflects growing investor bets on onchain credit infrastructure as stablecoin adoption expands.

articles.title: Ripple wants AI agents to pay in XRP and RLUSD. The market is still mostly USDC
articles.description: The XRPL AI Starter Kit gives developers tools for agent payments, but early x402 activity has clustered on Base and Solana. Ripple’s bet is that XRPL’s speed, low fees and RLUSD can win a piece of that flow.

articles.title: The FBI built its own replica small town to simulate real-world cyberattacks
articles.description: Hidden inside a building in Alabama, the FBI has created its own small town as a dedicated cyber training ground for simulating cyberattacks.

articles.title: 馬斯克身價可比七個黃仁勳！SpaceX 世紀掛牌引爆資金大洗牌，恐終結美股七雄霸局
articles.description: 全球首富馬斯克（Elon Musk）旗下「太空探索技術公司」（SpaceX）於 12 日首次公開募股（IPO） […]
